# funx

> A Dart package of composable function decorators.

funx wraps ordinary functions in small, chainable, reusable building blocks for timing, concurrency, reliability, caching, observability, and more.

## Author

Maksymilian Jakcowski — https://github.com/makjac

## Resources

- Package: https://pub.dev/packages/funx
- API reference: https://pub.dev/documentation/funx/latest/
- Library docs: https://pub.dev/documentation/funx/latest/funx/
- Repository: https://github.com/makjac/funx
- Author: https://github.com/makjac
- Website: https://funx.dev
